blocks.content: DSP supports OAuth 2.0 authentication using Salesforce security features, including:
Configure OAuth 2.0 Refresh Token Flow Authentication

children.content: Requires the Data Sync Pro Administrator permission set.
Requires access to configure authentication settings in both the Connected Org and the DSP App Org.

blocks.content: Complete the steps below to configure OAuth 2.0 authentication between the Connected Org and the DSP App Org.
1. Create External Client App in Connected Org

children.content: Create an External Client App to generate the Consumer Key and Consumer Secret required for OAuth authentication.

blocks.content: 2. Create Auth. Provider in DSP App Org

children.content: Create an Auth. Provider to connect the DSP App Org to the External Client App created in the Connected Org.
Consumer Key, Consumer Secret: Copy from the External Client App in the Connected Org.
Authorize Endpoint URL: Use "https://test.salesforce.com/services/oauth2/authorize" for sandbox environment or "https://login.salesforce.com/services/oauth2/authorize" for production.
Token Endpoint URL: Use "https://test.salesforce.com/services/oauth2/token" for sandbox environment or "https://login.salesforce.com/services/oauth2/token" for production.
Default Scopes: Enter required scopes. Separate multiple scopes with spaces.

blocks.content: 3. Update Callback URL in Connected Org

children.content: Update the External Client App to use the Callback URL generated in the DSP App Org.

blocks.content: 4. Create Named Credential in DSP App Org

children.content: URL: Enter the Connected Org domain URL (found in My Domain Settings).
Auth. Provider: Select the Auth. Provider created earlier.
Scope: Enter required scopes. Separate multiple scopes with spaces.

blocks.content: 5. Create and Test DSP Connection in DSP App Org
